title: Riverlight
description: Riverlight is a bespoke architectural retreat in Cassique, where west-facing river and ocean views, timeless craftsmanship, and smart-luxury design converge in harmony with Kiawah’s most protected natural beauty.
author: Estate Elegance

title: Vista Obsidian
description: A visionary retreat of modern elegance, Vista Obsidian pairs architectural artistry with private resort-style amenities—delivering 11,000+ sqft of cinematic living in Bel-Air’s most exclusive guard-gated enclave.
author: Estate Elegance

title: Celestia Point
description: Perched on a private peninsula with 270° waterfront views, Celestia Point blends architectural brilliance, complete seclusion, and unmatched indoor-outdoor luxury—where each sunrise and sunset becomes your private light show.
author: Estate Elegance

title: Crown Pointe on Minnetonka
description: An architectural and design triumph perched on 8 private acres with 655 feet of west-facing shoreline—offering three luxurious residences, artisan-crafted finishes, and sunset views that crown it as the Midwest’s most iconic waterfront estate.
author: Estate Elegance

title: The Sheridan Legacy Estate
description: A once-in-a-generation Tudor Revival masterpiece blending historic grandeur with refined modern living, featuring over an acre of private grounds, a 60-foot pool, and the rare potential to expand your estate in the heart of East Winnetka.
author: Estate Elegance

title: The Aquaria Estate
description: A private Gulf Coast sanctuary with a deep-water dock, resort-style saltwater pool, 1,400-gallon living reef aquarium, and nearly 9,000 sq ft of coastal elegance crafted for those who expect the extraordinary.
author: Estate Elegance

title: The Cascadia at Two Coves
description: A modern architectural retreat where water, stone, and light converge—featuring a moat entrance, private wellness pavilion, and sweeping Hill Country views for a lifestyle of elevated serenity.
author: Estate Elegance

title: Verdelux Pavilion
description: A poetic fusion of architectural mastery and nature’s serenity, Verdelux Pavilion is a luminous mid-century jewel where cascading waterfalls, glass-wrapped living, and indoor-outdoor harmony transform everyday life into an artful retreat above the Hollywood Hills.
author: Estate Elegance

title: Oakley Haven
description: A private waterfront playground on nearly 38 acres, Oakley Haven blends luxury, adventure, and Southern charm with a private airstrip, two boat docks, and a multimillion-dollar event estate—just 25 minutes from the heart of Nashville.
author: Estate Elegance

title: The Glass House
description: A breathtaking fusion of Parisian design and modern luxury, The Glass House offers an immersive, resort-style sanctuary where architecture and nature live in perfect harmony.
author: Estate Elegance

title: Villa Cielo Azul
description: A secluded Santa Fe masterpiece where resort-level luxury, breathtaking views, and timeless New Mexican craftsmanship converge into an extraordinary living experience.
author: Estate Elegance

title: La Duna
description: A custom-built, 23,000 sq ft waterfront masterpiece in Manalapan, La Duna seamlessly blends private beachfront living, extravagant entertainment, and spa-level wellness across nearly two acres of Florida’s most exclusive coastline.
author: Estate Elegance

title: Cortina Farms
description: Set across 120 acres of rolling Tennessee countryside, Cortina Farms is a turnkey Tuscan-inspired estate where stone-crafted elegance, world-class equestrian facilities, and event-worthy amenities converge to offer an extraordinary blend of serenity, sophistication, and celebration.
author: Estate Elegance

title: Casa Solmare
description: Blending organic materials with cutting-edge design, Casa Solmare is a bayfront sanctuary on the Venetian Islands where retractable glass walls, rooftop serenity, and a 1,200 sq ft primary suite redefine tropical modern luxury.
author: Estate Elegance

title: The Columns of West End
description: A timeless symbol of Nashville elegance, The Columns of West End blends award-winning historic architecture with refined modern luxury in one of the city’s most prestigious neighborhoods.
author: Estate Elegance

title: Villa del Lago Élan
description: A breathtaking Modern Mediterranean estate perched on Lake Tibet’s shores, Villa del Lago Élan offers unrivaled luxury with a two-story boathouse, resort-style pool oasis, and sweeping lake views from Windermere’s highest elevation.
author: Estate Elegance
